title: eriogonum evanidum
intro: Eriogonum evanidum, also known as the Desert Buckwheat or Ghost Buckwheat, is a shrub-like perennial plant that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum evanidum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and its leaves can also be used in salads or as a cooked green.
